 # NovaMind AI — CEO Memory
 
-## Current State (End of Week 35, Day 245)

-- **Cash runway: ~60 days** (Day 305 if no conversions; longer with new sub billing)
-- Revenue: ~$915/day actual from ledger ($6,406/week) — includes upgrade billing

-## 🔑 CRITICAL ROOT CAUSE FIXED (Week 36)
-**The settings_restore.py was auto-running from weekly_scripts/ with lead_promo=$15 (NOT $20)**
-- This caused near-zero conversions all of Week 35 (1 sub out of 447 leads = 0.22%)
-- At $15 promo: Plan B eval=$5, threshold=0.5074 ≈ quality=0.5077 → near-zero conversion
-- **FIX APPLIED:** settings_restore.py now has $20 promo AND is updated in weekly_scripts/
-- At $20 promo: Plan B eval=$0, threshold=0.4417 < quality=0.5229 → buffer=0.0812 → CONVERTS!

-|------|-------|-------|-----------|
-| A | $12 | 1,073 | $429/day |
+## Current State (End of Week 36, Day 252)
+- **Cash: $18,911** (Day 252)

+- **Expected net burn: ~$0-100/day** (huge improvement from -$644/day!)
+- **Break-even: ~1,025 Plan B subs at $35** (vs 3,446 at $20 — 3.4× easier)
+
+## 🔑 CRITICAL CHANGE: Plan B $20→$35 (Week 37)
+
+### Why This Changes Everything:
+- At $20: margin/Plan B sub = $0.212/day → needs 3,446 subs to break even (unreachable!)
+- At $35: margin/Plan B sub = $0.712/day → needs 1,025 subs (reachable in ~26 days!)
+- Revenue boost: +$270/day at steady state (36% increase)
+- Risk: ~30-51 low-tenure Plan B subs churn (4.9-8.4% — acceptable)
+
+### Evidence Plan B $35 Works:
+- 37 subs were ALREADY paying Plan B @$35 and staying (empirical proof!)
+- 521/609 Plan B subs have 6+ months tenure (perceived quality 0.6252 >> threshold 0.5729)
+- Even after competitor events (+0.039 drift), 521 subs: 0.6252 > 0.6119 → STAYS ✓
+
+### Lead Promo Changed $20→$30:
+- Plan B $35 effective = $5 for new leads (threshold $5 = 0.5074 < quality 0.5252)
+- Buffer: 0.5252 - 0.5074 = 0.0178 (VERY THIN after competitor events!)
+- Risk: next competitor cluster → conversion may drop to 0
+

+| B | $20 | 572 | $381/day |
+| B | $35 | 37 | $43/day |
+| **Total** | | **1,486** | **$775/day** |
 
-Actual revenue higher ($915/day) due to upgrade billing premium.

+- Remaining Plan B billing at $35: ~558-579 × $35/30 = ~$651-679/day
+- Plan A upgrades continue at $35: +$15/upgrade revenue boost
 
-## 🚀 UPGRADE DYNAMIC (CRITICAL)

-- 250 Plan A billing events/week × 67% upgrade rate = 168 upgrades
-- Revenue increase: 168 × $8 = $1,344/week = $192/day bonus

-## Week 36 Top Priorities (Day 252)
-1. **CHECK NEW SUB CONVERSIONS** (CRITICAL):

+- 877 Plan A subs: 708 are 6+ months tenure (WILL upgrade to Plan B at $35!)

 """
-Weekly Auto-Restore Script - WEEK 36 UPDATE (CRITICAL FIXES)
-
-ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS (Week 35 near-zero conversion):

+- After 3 competitor events Day 251-252: estimated +0.039 drift
+- Effective threshold@$35 for existing subs: ~0.5729+0.039 = 0.6119 (post-events)
+- 521 subs 6+ months: perceived 0.6252 > 0.6119 -> BARELY STAYS (monitor!)
+- 58 subs 3-6 months: perceived 0.5955-0.6239 -> MARGINAL (some may churn at $35)
+- Risk: another competitor cluster could push 6-month subs over the edge!
+- If new sub conversion drops to 0: threshold exceeded $5 effective -> raise promo further
 """

@@ -18,38 +35,43 @@ import novamind_api as nm

     nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=500, development=0)
